question_zh_hant: 在沒有交通號誌的十字路口，兩車同時到達，誰應先行？
question_zh_hans: 在没有交通号志的十字路口，两车同时到达，谁应先行？
question_en: At an uncontrolled intersection, two cars arrive at the same time. Who should go first?
options_zh_hant: ["左側車輛先行。", "右側車輛先行。", "按喇叭較大聲者先行。", "兩車都直接通過。"]
options_zh_hans: ["左侧车辆先行。", "右侧车辆先行。", "按喇叭较大声者先行。", "两车都直接通过。"]
options_en: ["The vehicle on the left goes first.", "The vehicle on the right goes first.", "The one that honks louder goes first.", "Both vehicles proceed immediately."]
correct_option_en: The vehicle on the right goes first.

question_zh_hant: 看到八角形紅色 STOP 標誌時，正確做法是什麼？
question_zh_hans: 看到八角形红色 STOP 标志时，正确做法是什么？
question_en: What is the correct action when you see an octagonal red STOP sign?
options_zh_hant: ["減速後直接通過。", "完全停車，確認安全後再前進。", "只在有行人時停車。", "夜間可不停車。"]
options_zh_hans: ["减速后直接通过。", "完全停车，确认安全后再前进。", "只在有行人时停车。", "夜间可不停车。"]
options_en: ["Slow down and pass through.", "Come to a full stop, then proceed when safe.", "Stop only if pedestrians are present.", "At night you may skip stopping."]
correct_option_zh_hant: 完全停車，確認安全後再前進。
correct_option_zh_hans: 完全停车，确认安全后再前进。
correct_option_en: Come to a full stop, then proceed when safe.

question_zh_hant: 飲酒後準備開車，下列哪一項最安全？
question_zh_hans: 饮酒后准备开车，下列哪一项最安全？
question_en: After drinking alcohol, which option is the safest before driving?
options_zh_hant: ["喝咖啡後立刻開車。", "短距離開車通常沒問題。", "改搭計程車或由清醒駕駛代駕。", "開窗戶讓自己清醒即可。"]
options_zh_hans: ["喝咖啡后立刻开车。", "短距离开车通常没问题。", "改搭计程车或由清醒驾驶代驾。", "开窗户让自己清醒即可。"]
options_en: ["Drink coffee and drive right away.", "Short-distance driving is usually fine.", "Use a taxi or let a sober driver drive.", "Open windows to sober up and drive."]
correct_option_zh_hant: 改搭計程車或由清醒駕駛代駕。
correct_option_zh_hans: 改搭计程车或由清醒驾驶代驾。
correct_option_en: Use a taxi or let a sober driver drive.

question_zh_hant: 平行停車時，車輪最接近路緣石的距離應該如何？
question_zh_hans: 平行停车时，车轮最接近路缘石的距离应该如何？
question_en: When parallel parking, how should your wheel distance from the curb be?
options_zh_hant: ["越遠越好，方便起步。", "可壓上路緣石以防滑動。", "盡量靠近且不壓路緣石。", "與路緣石保持至少 1 公尺。"]
options_zh_hans: ["越远越好，方便起步。", "可压上路缘石以防滑动。", "尽量靠近且不压路缘石。", "与路缘石保持至少 1 公尺。"]
options_en: ["Farther is better for easier departure.", "You may rest on the curb to prevent rolling.", "Stay close to the curb without touching it.", "Keep at least 1 meter from the curb."]
correct_option_zh_hant: 盡量靠近且不壓路緣石。
correct_option_zh_hans: 尽量靠近且不压路缘石。
correct_option_en: Stay close to the curb without touching it.

question_zh_hant: 右轉前遇到自行車道時，較佳做法是？
question_zh_hans: 右转前遇到自行车道时，较佳做法是？
question_en: Before making a right turn across a bike lane, what is the best practice?
options_zh_hant: ["不看後視鏡，直接右轉。", "在安全情況下提前併入，再完成右轉。", "長按喇叭後快速切過去。", "停在車道中央等待他人讓行。"]
options_zh_hans: ["不看后视镜，直接右转。", "在安全情况下提前并入，再完成右转。", "长按喇叭后快速切过去。", "停在车道中央等待他人让行。"]
options_en: ["Turn right without checking mirrors.", "Merge early when safe, then complete the right turn.", "Hold the horn and cut across quickly.", "Stop in the middle lane and wait for others to yield."]
correct_option_zh_hant: 在安全情況下提前併入，再完成右轉。
correct_option_zh_hans: 在安全情况下提前并入，再完成右转。
correct_option_en: Merge early when safe, then complete the right turn.

question_zh_hant: 下雨天高速行駛時，最重要的是？
question_zh_hans: 下雨天高速行驶时，最重要的是？
question_en: When driving at high speed in rain, what is most important?
options_zh_hant: ["提高車速盡快到達。", "縮短跟車距離避免被插隊。", "降低車速並增加跟車距離。", "只需開啟雙閃，不必減速。"]
options_zh_hans: ["提高车速尽快到达。", "缩短跟车距离避免被插队。", "降低车速并增加跟车距离。", "只需开启双闪，不必减速。"]
options_en: ["Increase speed to arrive sooner.", "Shorten following distance to avoid being cut off.", "Reduce speed and increase following distance.", "Only turn on hazard lights; no need to slow down."]
correct_option_zh_hant: 降低車速並增加跟車距離。
correct_option_zh_hans: 降低车速并增加跟车距离。
correct_option_en: Reduce speed and increase following distance.

question_zh_hant: 綠燈亮起但前方路口堵塞時，應如何處理？
question_zh_hans: 绿灯亮起但前方路口堵塞时，应如何处理？
question_en: If the light is green but the intersection ahead is blocked, what should you do?
options_zh_hant: ["進入路口等待慢慢通過。", "先停在停止線後，待有空間再進入。", "鳴笛催促前車讓路。", "借用對向車道繞過。"]
options_zh_hans: ["进入路口等待慢慢通过。", "先停在停止线后，待有空间再进入。", "鸣笛催促前车让路。", "借用对向车道绕过。"]
options_en: ["Enter the intersection and wait inside.", "Stay behind the stop line until there is space ahead.", "Use the horn to pressure the car in front.", "Use the opposite lane to go around."]
correct_option_zh_hant: 先停在停止線後，待有空間再進入。
correct_option_zh_hans: 先停在停止线后，待有空间再进入。
correct_option_en: Stay behind the stop line until there is space ahead.

question_zh_hant: 接近有人行橫道且有行人等待通過時，你應該？
question_zh_hans: 接近有人行横道且有行人等待通过时，你应该？
question_en: When approaching a crosswalk with pedestrians waiting to cross, you should:
options_zh_hant: ["保持車速通過，行人會讓車。", "減速觀察，必要時停車讓行。", "切到左側車道加速通過。", "只在白天讓行，夜晚可先行。"]
options_zh_hans: ["保持车速通过，行人会让车。", "减速观察，必要时停车让行。", "切到左侧车道加速通过。", "只在白天让行，夜晚可先行。"]
options_en: ["Maintain speed; pedestrians will yield.", "Slow down and stop when necessary to yield.", "Move left and accelerate through.", "Yield only in daytime, not at night."]
correct_option_zh_hant: 減速觀察，必要時停車讓行。
correct_option_zh_hans: 减速观察，必要时停车让行。
correct_option_en: Slow down and stop when necessary to yield.
